title: VOLUNTEERING - 211info
text: CENTRAL NAZARENE UGM VOLUNTEERING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF For community members interested in becoming volunteers at Central Nazarene UGM overnight shelter. 9715 SE Powell Boulevard Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Age 18 and older, must pass a background check Hours: 7 days a week 6:30am-8am and 9pm-11pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Volunteers are responsible for the payment of the background fee DOCUMENTS: Proof of background check AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Volunteer Opportunities * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - CHURCH OF THE NAZARENE SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRAL NAZARENE UGM
